title: Heavenly Dreams Design System
description: Official visual identity contract. All platforms consume these tokens via @hd/core-tokens. No platform may define its own palette or typography.

typography.rule: Inter for UI, forms, tables and operational text. Poppins for headings, hero sections, marketing and branding.

rules.singleSource: Palette and typography changes happen only in HD-CORE via PR.
rules.noLocalStyles: No repo defines its own colors, fonts or spacing outside tokens.
rules.webExtension: HD-WEB may extend with marketing styles but must start from base tokens.
rules.newComponents: New shared components are proposed first in packages/ui.
